text:
Created attachment 242414
diff file for update to 1.32.3.7089

multimedia/plexmediaserver-plexpass: Update to 1.32.3.7089

 * New release from Plex.tv

  Changelog:

   https://forums.plex.tv/t/plex-media-server/30447/582

    NEW:
     (NAS) - Synology - Add support for DS223 family models
      (rtd1619 & rtd1619b processors)

    FIXES:
     (Collections) Wording of collections display preference
      was confusing.
     (DVR) Finding USB device even if it’s plugged into a
      different USB port.
     (Photos) “Recently Added in Photos” may not include any
      items in a sub folder.
     (PlayQueue) Playing an episode in a show that has a later
      aired unmatched episode could play the wrong episode.

  QA:

   portlint OK (0 fatal errors)
